item.title: Thomson Reuters to Present at CIBC Technology & Innovation Conference
item.description: TORONTO, May 18, 2026 /CNW/ -- Steve Assie, General Manager, Global Large Law Firms and Erin Brown, Head of Finance, Corporates at Thomson Reuters (TSX/Nasdaq: TRI) will both present at the CIBC Technology & Innovation Conference on Thursday, May 21, 2026 at 11:40 a.m. EDT.
item.dc:creator: Thomson Reuters News Releases

item.title: Thomson Reuters Reports First-Quarter 2026 Results
item.description: TORONTO, May 5, 2026 /CNW/ -- Thomson Reuters (TSX/Nasdaq: TRI) today reported results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026:      Strong revenue growth in the first quarter Total company revenues up 10% / organic revenues up 8% Organic revenues up 9% for the "Big 3" segments (Legal
item.dc:creator: Thomson Reuters News Releases

item.title: Thomson Reuters Announces Cash Distribution Per Share and Share Consolidation Ratio for Return of Capital and Share Consolidation Transactions
item.description: Participating shareholders to receive cash distribution of US$1.435518 per common share Shares to begin trading on a post-consolidated basis on May 4, 2026 TORONTO, May 1, 2026 /CNW/ -- Thomson Reuters (TSX/Nasdaq: TRI) today announced the cash distribution per common share and the share consolidation ratio for its
item.dc:creator: Thomson Reuters News Releases

item.title: Thomson Reuters to Announce First-Quarter 2026 Results
item.description: TORONTO, April 16, 2026 /CNW/ -- Thomson Reuters (TSX/Nasdaq: TRI) plans to announce first-quarter 2026 results before the market opens on Tuesday, May 6, 2026. The company will webcast a discussion of its results beginning at 8:30 a.m. EDT. Go to ir.thomsonreuters.com to register and access the webcast. It will
item.dc:creator: Thomson Reuters News Releases

item.title: Thomson Reuters to Return $4.4 Billion of Proceeds from Sale of Minority Interest in London Stock Exchange Group
item.description: Board approves return of capital transaction expected to return approximately US$4.4 billion to common shareholders on a pro rata basis Transaction also expected to increase Thomson Reuters' annualized free cash flow per share by approximately 10% due to reduced share count TORONTO, April 1, 2026 /CNW/ -- Thomson
item.dc:creator: Thomson Reuters News Releases
